chosen_action.title: Fix active-window truth messaging and blocker filtering for the execution board

why_this_action.summary: The current short-window blocker had not cleared yet, but the lane summary and blocker list were still overstating cleared/remaining state in ways that could fuel fake-progress churn.

expected_outcome: Execution-board messaging stays truthful during the active short window and no longer counts already-covered non-runtime publisher targets as fresh remaining blockers.
